# Dr. Suranjana Roy

> MDS Oral & Maxillofacial Surgeon specializing in head & neck oncosurgery, maxillofacial reconstruction, and general dentistry. Practicing in Siliguri and Kolkata, West Bengal.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, qualifications, and academic work.
- [Book Appointment](/book-appointment): Contact information and consultation booking.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Clinical case studies index.
- [Right Neck Schwannoma](/case-studies/right-neck-schwannoma): Case study.
- [Odontogenic Keratocyst](/case-studies/odontogenic-keratocyst): Case study.
- [Verrucous Carcinoma (Buccal)](/case-studies/verrucous-carcinoma-buccal): Case study.
- [Panfacial Trauma Reconstruction](/case-studies/panfacial-trauma-reconstruction): Case study.
